steps.text: You found some good ones. But check your choices again. All three scenarios involve counting and comparing categories, which is exactly what bar graphs do well.

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

steps.text: Let me show you how to think about this. Each scenario counts something and compares the results. Field trips: you count votes for each destination. Library: you count checkouts for each genre. Cafeteria: you count choices for each lunch. All three compare categories, so all three work with bar graphs.
